fields.acceptance_criteria: 1) ticket-viewer imports theme store from viewer-api and initializes with createThemeStore. 2) EffectSettings interface and DEFAULT_EFFECT_SETTINGS exported from viewer-api. 3) ticket-viewer has effectSettings signal with localStorage persistence. 4) ThemeSettings component (or equivalent) available in ticket-viewer for choosing presets. 5) CSS variables injected reactively.
fields.title: Feature: Share themes and effects from log-viewer to ticket-viewer

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1) ticket-viewer imports theme store from viewer-api and initializes with createThemeStore. 2) EffectSettings interface and DEFAULT_EFFECT_SETTINGS exported from viewer-api. 3) ticket-viewer has effectSettings signal with localStorage persistence. 4) ThemeSettings component (or equivalent) available in ticket-viewer for choosing presets. 5) CSS variables injected reactively.
fields.title: Feature: Share themes and effects from log-viewer to ticket-viewer

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1) viewer-api exports ColorTheme (name, description, colors: ThemeColors) and EffectTheme (name, description, effects: EffectSettings) as separate types. 2) ThemePreset composes ColorTheme + optional EffectTheme. 3) ThemeSettings component shared from viewer-api; each viewer provides its own preset list via props. 4) EffectSettings interface and DEFAULT_EFFECT_SETTINGS exported from viewer-api. 5) ticket-viewer defines its own preset palette (not log-viewer's). 6) Effects are off by default in ticket-viewer. 7) ticket-viewer has effectSettings signal with localStorage persistence. 8) CSS variables injected reactively from ColorTheme.
fields.title: Feature: Share themes and effects from log-viewer to ticket-viewer
